The '''Tsilor Sea''' was a body of [[Water/Legends|water]] on the edge of the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Phemiss]], which was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. The [[Pharine River]] flowed into the Tsilor Sea.<ref name="CatCW" />
